headline: 3 Top-Ranked Dividend Stocks: A Smarter Way to Boost Your Retirement Income
summary: The traditional retirement planning approaches no longer cover all expenses in nest egg years. So what can retirees do? Thankfully, there are alternative investments that provide steady, higher-rate income streams to replace dwindling bond yields.

headline: EOG Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong Output Growth
summary: EOG Resources beat Q126 EPS and revenue estimates on output growth, fueling $1.49B free cash flow, dividends, buybacks and liquids-leaning guidance.

headline: EOG Resources: Time To Buy
summary: EOG Resources' operational resilience and industry leadership make it a strong candidate during market sell-offs. Find out why EOG stock is a Buy.
